mapper.select: SELECT #{yearMonth} AS `year_month`, d.id AS department_id, d.department_name, COUNT(e.id) AS employee_count, COALESCE(a.normal_count, 0) AS normal_count, COALESCE(a.late_count, 0) AS late_count, COALESCE(a.absent_count, 0) AS absent_count, COALESCE(l.leave_days, 0) AS leave_days, COALESCE(o.overtime_hours, 0) AS overtime_hours, COALESCE(t.trip_days, 0) AS trip_days FROM department d LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = d.id AND e.status = '在职' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.department_id, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '正常' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '迟到' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '缺勤' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent_count FROM attendance_record a INNER JOIN employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(a.attendance_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = '在职' AND (a.remark IS NULL OR a.remark NOT LIKE '[已删除]%') GROUP BY e.department_id ) a ON a.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.department_id, SUM(l.days) AS leave_days FROM leave_record l INNER JOIN employee e ON l.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(l.start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = '在职' AND l.status != '已取消' GROUP BY e.department_id ) l ON l.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.department_id, SUM(o.hours) AS overtime_hours FROM overtime_record o INNER JOIN employee e ON o.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.overtime_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = '在职' AND (o.reason IS NULL OR o.reason NOT LIKE '[已删除]%') GROUP BY e.department_id ) o ON o.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.department_id, SUM(t.days) AS trip_days FROM business_trip_record t INNER JOIN employee e ON t.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(t.start_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = '在职' AND (t.reason IS NULL OR t.reason NOT LIKE '[已删除]%') GROUP BY e.department_id ) t ON t.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id, d.department_name, a.normal_count, a.late_count, a.absent_count, l.leave_days, o.overtime_hours, t.trip_days ORDER BY d.id
